name: Southwestern Egg Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Grease an 8-inch square baking dish.
2. In a medium skillet, brown the sausage with onion and bell pepper; drain excess fat.
3. Arrange the potatoes in the bottom of the greased baking dish. Spread half of the cheese over the potatoes, then add all of the sausage mixture, followed by the remaining cheese.
4. In a small bowl, beat the eggs slightly. Add milk and stir to combine. Pour this mixture evenly over the top of the dish. Cover with foil.
5. Bake in the preheated oven for 1 hour. Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10 to 15 minutes, or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving. Serve topped with salsa.
Nutrition Information Per Serving:
490 Calories, 32 g Fat, 1340 mg Sodium
